acceptance_criteria: init writes an always-on conventions section to the target's agent instructions: consult WORK.md before starting, carry Work-Item ids in commits for matching open items, write a proposal first for uncovered work, and never edit .agentflow/work/ directly

Vendored, dependency-free hooks run offline in milliseconds: pre-commit refuses staged .agentflow/work/ changes while always allowing .agentflow/proposals/, and commit-msg suggests a Work-Item trailer in observe mode and requires one only in strict mode

The enforcement mode defaults to observe and is recorded as committed repository policy; init proves committability with git check-ignore and, when the repository's ignore rules make the policy file un-committable under any ignore form (glob, directory, nested), fails with a single actionable message naming the rule to change instead of attempting to defeat the ignore configuration; in observe mode a developer with no Agentflow knowledge is never blocked by anything except direct .agentflow/work/ edits
summary: agentflow init installs passive agent conventions and self-contained observe/strict git hooks

acceptance_criteria: reconcile walks drift findings and completion-claim proposals into proposed dispositions per affected Work Item: still valid, completed externally, partially done with amended acceptance criteria, or invalidated back to Framing
A completed-externally disposition records attributed external-completion evidence naming the outside commits, explicitly distinct from Run-backed completion, and never fabricates Run evidence
No disposition is applied without explicit human confirmation, and one confirmation pass yields a single updated graph ready for one re-approval
summary: agentflow work reconcile: disposition-based recovery that absorbs external work in one human review
